resources.string: This flow explains how the feature helps users find the least common multiple of two numbers.
On the last screen, type two positive whole numbers and tap the button to calculate the LCM.
The onboarding screen appears before the calculator when the one-minute shortcut is inactive.
Because the calculator was visited recently, the next tap skips onboarding for one minute.
Just type the numbers and the app will show the least common multiple for you.
